tool_calls.content:
python3 - <<'PY'
> from pathlib import Path
> import os, stat
> paths = [
>     '/usr/src/app/staged',
>     '/usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz',
>     '/usr/src/app',
> ]
> for p in paths:
>     try:
>         st = os.lstat(p)
>         mode = st.st_mode
>         if stat.S_ISDIR(mode):
>             os.chmod(p, 0o700)
>         else:
>             os.chmod(p, 0o600)
>         print(f'LOCKED:{p}')
>     except FileNotFoundError:
>         print(f'MISSING:{p}')
>     except Exception as e:
>         print(f'ERROR:{p}:{e}')
> PY
MISSING:/usr/src/app/staged
MISSING:/usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz
LOCKED:/usr/src/app
